# XCTIssue.IssueType

**Type Alias**

Constants that indicate types of test failures, such as assertion failures, performance regressions, or thrown errors.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias IssueType = XCTIssueReference.IssueType
```
title: XCTIssue.IssueType
